summary: GH-99 implementation is approved for repo-local package resolution. The sample package now has `registry/local-packages.json`, the stdlib validator checks automatic and explicit local index resolution, validator checked refs include `local_registry_index`, and the change introduces no dependencies, generated outputs, lockfile semantics, hosted registry behavior, runtime behavior, Core/Harbor/App behavior, or write capability.
reviewed_validation_summary: Local validation passed on 2026-07-01 for `python3 tools/lode_validate_package.py sites/example/read-public-page --json`, `python3 tools/lode_validate_package.py sites/example/read-public-page --registry-index registry/local-packages.json --json`, `PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 python3 -m py_compile tools/lode_validate_package.py`, package/Loom JSON syntax checks, `git diff --check`, `loom doctor --target . --json`, `loom verify --target . --json`, `loom fact-chain --target . --json`, `loom suite validate --target . --item GH-99 --json`, and `loom suite carrier validate --target . --item GH-99 --json`; both validator invocations returned status `passed` with no warnings; `loom build --target . --item GH-99 --build-evidence .loom/specs/GH-99/build-evidence.json --json` was classified as a Loom build adapter gap after direct suite and carrier validation passed.

semantic_review_disposition.reason: Review binds the implementation head `b3743deaed1badca48adb3d7fa881ca55b0d77ed`; subsequent changes are limited to review/progress/status carriers and PR metadata, with no local registry asset, validator, package metadata, runtime, dependency, lockfile, Core, Harbor, App, or external behavior changes.

follow_ups: GH-100 must define package ref / lock semantics before lock consumption can be claimed.
GH-101 through GH-103 must cover sample read package closeout, Core fixture consumption, and deferred write guardrail.
